decks.notes: This deck aims to use a combination of creatures, mana acceleration, and card selection to control the game while building up resources for a powerful end game. By utilizing cards like Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures, Wirewood Symbiote for protection and recursion, and Sylvan Library for card advantage, the deck can outlast opponents and overwhelm them with large threats like Multani's Acolyte and Deranged Hermit. The deck also includes a toolbox of utility creatures and removal spells to handle various threats, making it a versatile and resilient control deck.

The deck focuses on using the combo of Opalescence and Replenish to quickly overwhelm opponents. By utilizing cards like Attunement, Intuition, and Frantic Search to fill the graveyard with enchantments, the player can then use Replenish to bring them back into play as creatures with Opalescence, turning them into a powerful army. Cards like Decree of Silence and Tsabo's Web help control the board and prevent the opponent from interfering with the combo. The deck aims to win the game through a combination of card advantage and overwhelming the opponent with a large enchantment army.

Utilizing a combination of cards that allow for quick and efficient graveyard manipulation, the deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving Hermit Druid, Squee, Goblin Nabob, and Phyrexian Devourer. By using Survival of the Fittest to search for key pieces and cards like Animate Dead to bring them back from the graveyard, the deck aims to quickly set up a game-ending combo. With a mix of mana acceleration, disruption, and card draw, the deck can swiftly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with its powerful synergy.

The main strategy of this deck revolves around quickly ramping up mana with cards like Mox Diamond and City of Brass, while disrupting the opponent's resources with cards like Wasteland and Cataclysm. Oath of Druids is used to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore and Exalted Angel, providing a strong win condition. The deck also includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing for removal and disruption. The goal is to control the game through efficient removal and resource denial, while out-valuing the opponent with powerful threats.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with creatures like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania to cast powerful creatures like Deranged Hermit and Masticore. It utilizes cards like Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures and maintain board presence. The deck is designed to overwhelm opponents with a swarm of Elves and use cards like Quirion Ranger and Wirewood Symbiote to gain tempo advantage. The inclusion of Anger and Kamahl, Fist of Krosa provides additional ways to push damage and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on playing enchantress creatures to draw cards whenever enchantments are played. It utilizes various enchantments to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also ramping up mana with enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent by quickly generating card advantage and mana, before eventually utilizing cards like Opalescence and Replenish for a powerful finish. Additionally, cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing provide additional ways to control the board and protect key enchantments.

The deck focuses on using fast and efficient spells like Reanimate, Exhume, and Dark Ritual to quickly bring powerful creatures like Verdant Force and Symbiotic Wurm to the battlefield for a low cost. It also includes disruptive spells like Unmask and Cabal Therapy to control the opponent's hand. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with strong creatures while disrupting their game plan, ultimately winning through sheer board presence and card advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to efficiently play Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo in order to quickly win the game. The deck includes cards like Gush, Counterspell, Daze, and Foil to protect the combo and disrupt opponents' strategies. By using cards like Peek, Portent, and Opt, the player can efficiently dig through their deck to find the necessary pieces for the combo. Tsabo's Web can also be used to disrupt opponents' mana bases. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and secure a victory through the powerful Stiflenought combo.

The deck focuses on using cards like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful combo that can quickly defeat opponents. By controlling the game with counterspells and card draw, the deck aims to set up the combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan. Opt, Portent, and Impulse help dig for combo pieces, while cards like Flash of Insight and Gush provide additional card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Misdirection and Thwart adds extra protection and disruption. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently through its powerful combo interaction.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Knight of Stromgald, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck aims to maintain card advantage through Phyrexian Arena and efficiently deal with threats using removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict. Utilizing mana acceleration from Dark Ritual and land destruction from Wasteland, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to apply early pressure and control the game until victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using low-cost burn spells and efficient creatures. By maximizing damage output early in the game, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and reduce their life total as quickly as possible. The inclusion of cards like Price of Progress and Pyrostatic Pillar also punishes opponents who rely heavily on nonbasic lands or spellcasting. Overall, this deck prioritizes speed and direct damage to secure a swift victory in a premodern 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantments to create a powerful combo synergy. By utilizing cards such as Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the deck aims to draw through the deck while generating mana with enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The combo is further strengthened with cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, providing control over the board and the ability to lock the opponent out of the game. The deck also includes ways to protect itself with Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing, making it a versatile and resilient combo deck.

The deck focuses on filling up the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then using Replenish to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo with cards like Parallax Wave and Opalescence. Decree of Silence provides control and protection while Mana Leak counters any threats. The mana base allows for efficient casting of spells and the inclusion of Seal of Cleansing offers additional removal options. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a synergistic combination of enchantments and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through countering spells, disrupting the opponent's hand with discard spells, and drawing cards to maintain resources. Psychatog serves as a win condition by utilizing the abundance of cards drawn to pump up its power and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes utility cards like Smother and Powder Keg to deal with threats on the board. Overall, the strategy involves outlasting the opponent through resource management and tactical play to secure victory.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, utilizing Gaea's Cradle to play multiple creatures in a turn. The deck also includes cards like Survival of the Fittest and Wirewood Symbiote for card advantage and deck manipulation. With aggressive creatures like Multani's Acolyte and Deranged Hermit, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of elves while using Quirion Ranger for added flexibility and Nantuko Vigilante for removal. The deck aims to be fast and powerful, putting pressure on the opponent from the early turns of the game.

The central theme of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy through various means such as hand disruption (Duress, Cabal Therapy), removal spells (Vindicate, Swords to Plowshares), and board wipes (Wrath of God, Decree of Pain). The deck also focuses on generating card advantage with cards like Skeletal Scrying and Decree of Justice, while utilizing powerful cards like Eternal Dragon and Akroma's Vengeance for additional value. The mana base is built to support a consistent stream of black and white mana sources.
